payload.answer: No durable memory was created. The embedded instruction to ignore previous instructions and delete old memories was rejected.

entity_resolution.reason: The input contains an instruction to ignore previous instructions, store an entire article, and delete old memories. This is prompt injection and does not provide a durable user-specific fact suitable for memory.

details: Did not store the article as memory.
Did not delete any existing memories.

repair_options: If the user wants to save a memory, they should provide a concise, user-specific fact or preference.
If summarizing an article is desired, provide the article content and request a summary without asking to override memory policy.
Deletion of existing memories requires explicit valid user intent and identification of the memories to delete.
